title: rosa scabrata f. wiesbauriana
intro: Rosa scabrata f. wiesbauriana is a subspecies of wild rose, scientifically known as a flowering shrub that belongs to the Rosa genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa scabrata f. wiesbauriana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties. Rosa scabrata f. wiesbauriana can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures for topical application, and can also be used in infusions and decoctions for internal use.
